name: wallos
description: WallOs monorepo: app Flutter para macOS y landing web.

scripts.dev:web: npm run wallpapers:sync && npm run dev --workspace @wallos/web
scripts.build:web: npm run wallpapers:sync && npm run build --workspace @wallos/web
scripts.preview:web: npm run wallpapers:sync && npm run preview --workspace @wallos/web
scripts.run:flutter:macos: npm run wallpapers:sync:flutter && cd apps/desktop_flutter && flutter run -d macos
